description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized mirvetuximab soravtansine for the treatment of adult patients with with folate receptor-alpha (FDalpha) positive, platinum-resistant high grade serous epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal cancer who have received one to three prior systemic treatment regimens.

contributions.description: On 2024-12-11, the EMA provided approval to Elahere (mirvetuximab soravtansine) for the treatment of adult patients with with folate receptor-alpha (FDalpha) positive, platinum-resistant high grade serous epithelial ovarian, fallopian tube, or primary peritoneal cancer who have received one to three prior systemic treatment regimens.

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
